title: Markets Near Highs Despite Geopolitical Backdrop
html:
Markets Near Highs Despite Geopolitical Backdrop

Good morning traders.

+ Market Pulse: Markets are showing resilience to geopolitical concerns, with SPY trading within 1.2% of all-time highs and VIX struggling to hold 18. Bank earnings reactions have been mildly negative so far. ASML and TSM earnings will be important today and tomorrow for tech direction. Oil prices remain elevated, indicating geopolitical risks persist despite market optimism.

+ SPX tracker: The SPX has moved back above the 6,850 level that has been a key pivot zone over recent months.
Levels: Resistance at 6911, and 6965. Support at 6768, 6707, and 6650.
- Short term lines: ES_F | SPX (TV broken SPX quotes- TOS paste)

+ Trends update: SPY | QQQ | IWM | VIX | OIL | GOLD.

+ Live discussion, available HERE (PW: 131313)

Nic

+ Key Talking Point:
— TODAY —
★★ PPI
— Thu Apr 16 —
★★ Industrial Production
★★ Initial Jobless Claims

+ Earnings TABLE

Wed Apr 15: ASML BAC MS PGR PNC MTB FHN | JBHT (KMI)
Thu Apr 16: TSM PEP ABT SCHW PLD BK USB MRSH TRV CFG WIT KEY | NFLX AA
Fri Apr 17: TFC FITB ERIC STT RF ALLY | (HDB IBN)

NOTE ID: 202604140448 | 0414
